ice_shard.name: ICE Shard
ice_shard.description: Residual data from a defeated ICE. Glitches when held.

rom_echo.name: ROM Echo
rom_echo.description: Memory trace of a construct. Voices echo when held.

wetware_chip.name: Wetware Chip
wetware_chip.description: Bio-software component. Connects directly to the nervous system.

biosoft_agent.name: Biosoft Agent
biosoft_agent.description: Living software. Organic code. Held close, it almost breathes.

combat_module.name: Combat Module
combat_module.description: Stabilized combat data. Base for program crafting.

construct_shard.name: Construct Shard
construct_shard.description: Fragment of a construct's identity. Used for construct crafting.

wetware_data.name: Wetware Data
wetware_data.description: Hybrid bio-informational data. Base for item crafting.

ice_construct.name: ICE Construct
ice_construct.description: Residual ICE data with construct echoes. Black ICE-class base.
